title: daphne ridleyi
intro: Daphne ridleyi, also known as the Ridley's daphne or Chinese daphne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is a shrub that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Daphne ridleyi include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Daphne ridleyi is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall health and well-being.
